Name: CHR_COMMON_PARAM
Description: Defines parameters relating to the player and humanoid characters.

Fields.Name: Height Type
Fields.Description: The character height type.

Fields.Name: Weight Type
Fields.Description: The character height type.

Fields.Name: Medium Armor Weight Ratio: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum weight ratio for worn equipment to be considered 'medium armor'.

Fields.Name: Medium Armor Weight Ratio: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum weight ratio for worn equipment to be considered 'medium armor'.

Fields.Name: Fatigue Duration
Fields.Description: The duration after stamina has been exhausted before it will start to recover.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption: Dash
Fields.Description: The base stamina consumption cost when dashing.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption: Dash (Locked-on)
Fields.Description: The base stamina consumption cost when dashing and locked-on to a target.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption: Ladder Dash
Fields.Description: The base stamina consumption cost when dashing up a ladder.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption: Rope Slide
Fields.Description: The base stamina consumption cost when sliding down a rope.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption: Evasion
Fields.Description: The base stamina consumption cost when doing an evasive action.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption: Backstep
Fields.Description: The base stamina consumption cost when doing a backstep.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption: Roll
Fields.Description: The base stamina consumption cost when doing a roll.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption: Dashing Jump
Fields.Description: The base stamina consumption cost when doing a dashing jump.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption: Standing Jump
Fields.Description: The base stamina consumption cost when doing a standing jump.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption %: Evasion
Fields.Description: The stamina consumption rate when doing an evasive action.

Fields.Name: Stamina Consumption %: Attack
Fields.Description: The stamina consumption rate when doing an attack action.

Fields.Name: Stamina Decrease: Movement Disadvantage - Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum rate of movement disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

Fields.Name: Stamina Decrease: Movement Disadvantage - Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum rate of movement disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

Fields.Name: Stamina Decrease: Equipment Disadvantage - Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum rate of equipment disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

Fields.Name: Stamina Decrease: Equipment Disadvantage - Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum rate of equipment disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

Fields.Name: Stamina Decrease: Attack Disadvantage - Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum rate of attack disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

Fields.Name: Stamina Decrease: Attack Disadvantage - Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum rate of attack disadvantage duing stamina decreases.

Fields.Name: Insufficient Stamina: Attack Status Insufficiency %
Fields.Description: The insufficiency rate of attack status when insufficient stamina is present for an attack cost.

Fields.Name: Insufficient Stamina: Rolling Status Insufficiency %
Fields.Description: When insufficiency rate of rolling status when insufficient stamina is present for a roll cost.

Fields.Name: Exhausted Stamina: Duration from Attack
Fields.Description: If an attack exhausts all stamina, this is the duration (in seconds) that the stamina bar is kept empty.

Fields.Name: Exhausted Stamina: Attack Status Insufficiency %
Fields.Description: When insufficiency rate of attack status when stamina is exhausted due to an attack cost.

Fields.Name: Exhausted Stamina: Attack Preparation Regeneration %
Fields.Description: The attack preparation regeneration rate when stamina is exhausted due to an attack cost.

Fields.Name: Exhausted Stamina: Attack Standby Regeneration %
Fields.Description: The attack standby regeneration rate when stamina is exhausted due to an attack cost.

Fields.Name: Armor Type
Fields.Description: The armor type of the character.

Fields.Name: Damage Weapon Type
Fields.Description: The damage weapon type of the character.

Fields.Name: Ragdoll Follows Ground on Death
Fields.Description: If enabled, the character's ragdoll will follow the ground upon death.

Fields.Name: Death Timer: Elapsed Time A
Fields.Description: The elapsed time for the death timer (a).

Fields.Name: Low HP Threshold: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum value considered in the low HP theshold.

Fields.Name: Low HP Threshold: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum value considered in the low HP theshold.

Fields.Name: Dying Movement Blend %
Fields.Description: The movement blend rate when dying.

Fields.Name: Control Type
Fields.Description: The control type of the character.

Fields.Name: Movement Collision Type
Fields.Description: The movement collision type of the character.

Fields.Name: Movement Collision Height
Fields.Description: The height (in metres) of the collision capsule during movement.

Fields.Name: Movement Collision Radius
Fields.Description: The radius (in metres) of the collision capsule during movement.

Fields.Name: Collision Height
Fields.Description: The height (in metres) of the collision capsule for the character.

Fields.Name: Guard Cone Angle: Vertical
Fields.Description: The angle (in degrees) of the guard cone on the vertical axis.

Fields.Name: Guard Cone Angle: Horizontal
Fields.Description: The angle (in degrees) of the guard cone on the horizontal axis.

Fields.Name: Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum linear velocity (in metres per second) this character can move at.

Fields.Name: Weight Calculation: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum weight (in kilograms) used in the gravity rate calculation.

Fields.Name: Weight Calculation: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum weight (in kilograms) used in the gravity rate calculation.

Fields.Name: Gravity Acceleration %: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum value for gravity acceleration.

Fields.Name: Gravity Acceleration %: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum value for gravity acceleration.

Fields.Name: Gravity Speed: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum speed gravity can reach when applied to a character.

Fields.Name: Flight Braking %
Fields.Description: The braking rate of the character when moving with flight.

Fields.Name: Lock Point Type
Fields.Description: The lock point type of the character.

Fields.Name: Lock Camera: Category
Fields.Description: The correction category used for the lock-on camera for a character.

Fields.Name: Lock Camera: Disable Radius
Fields.Description: The radius (in metres) within which the lock camera is disabled.

Fields.Name: Lock Camera: Disable Height
Fields.Description: The height (in metres) within which the lock camera is disabled.

Fields.Name: Guard Knockback Reduction %: Very Small
Fields.Description: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Very Small'.

Fields.Name: Guard Knockback Reduction %: Small
Fields.Description: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Small'.

Fields.Name: Guard Knockback Reduction %: Medium
Fields.Description: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Medium'.

Fields.Name: Guard Knockback Reduction %: Large
Fields.Description: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Large'.

Fields.Name: Guard Knockback Reduction %: Very Large
Fields.Description: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Very Large'.

Fields.Name: Guard Knockback Reduction %: Immensely Large
Fields.Description: The guard knockback reduction rate applied when the attacker is considered 'Immensely Large'.

Fields.Name: Guard Knockback Reduction %: Deflection
Fields.Description: The guard knockback reduction rate applied during a deflection.

Fields.Name: Guard Rotation %
Fields.Description: The rotation rate when guarding.

Fields.Name: Can Head Shot
Fields.Description: If enabled, a character can be head shot.

Fields.Name: Can Guard Break
Fields.Description: If enabled, a character can be guard broken.

Fields.Name: Can Backstab
Fields.Description: If enabled, a character can be backstabbed.

Fields.Name: Can Riposte after Parry
Fields.Description: If enabled, a character can be riposted after a parry break.

Fields.Name: Riposte Vulnerability Time
Fields.Description: The riposte vulnerability duration (in seconds) after a parry break.

Fields.Name: Riposte Input Time Reduction
Fields.Description: The input time reduction (in seconds) after a parry break.

Fields.Name: Can Riposte after Guard Break
Fields.Description: If enabled, a character can be riposted after a guard break.

Fields.Name: Down Follow-up Attack: Allowable Distance
Fields.Description: The allowable distance (in metres) for a down follow-up attack.

Fields.Name: Backstab Cone Angle: Horizontal
Fields.Description: The horizontal cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a backstab can occur in.

Fields.Name: Backstab Cone Angle: Vertical
Fields.Description: The vertical cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a backstab can occur in.

Fields.Name: Backstab Height Difference
Fields.Description: The allowable height difference (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a backstab to occur.

Fields.Name: Backstab Distance
Fields.Description: The allowable distance (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a backstab to occur.

Fields.Name: Parry Riposte Cone Angle: Horizontal
Fields.Description: The horizontal cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a parry riposte can occur in.

Fields.Name: Parry Riposte Cone Angle: Vertical
Fields.Description: The vertical cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a parry riposte can occur in.

Fields.Name: Parry Riposte Height Difference
Fields.Description: The allowable height difference (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a parry riposte to occur.

Fields.Name: Parry Riposte Distance
Fields.Description: The allowable distance (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a parry riposte to occur.

Fields.Name: Guard Riposte Cone Angle: Horizontal
Fields.Description: The horizontal cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a guard break riposte can occur in.

Fields.Name: Guard Riposte Cone Angle: Vertical
Fields.Description: The vertical cone angle (in degrees) between the attacker and victim that a guard break riposte can occur in.

Fields.Name: Guard Riposte Height Difference
Fields.Description: The allowable height difference (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a guard break riposte to occur.

Fields.Name: Guard Riposte Distance
Fields.Description: The allowable distance (in metres) between the attacker and victim for a guard break riposte to occur.

Fields.Name: Enable Lower Body Damage
Fields.Description: If enabled, lower body damage can occur.

Fields.Name: Lower Body Damage: Crouch Amount %
Fields.Description: The amount of crouching that occurs when lower body damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Lower Body Damage: Crouch Time
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) of the crouching that occurs when lower body damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Lower Body Damage: Crouch Recovery Time
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) of the crouch recovery that occurs when lower body damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Lower Body Damage: Movement Reduction %
Fields.Description: The amount of movement speed reduction that occurs when lower body damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Lower Body Damage: Rotation Reduction %
Fields.Description: The amount of rotation speed reduction that occurs when lower body damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Ragdoll Mass %
Fields.Description: The mass multiplier to apply to the character's ragdoll.

Fields.Name: Ragdoll Friction %
Fields.Description: The friction coefficient multiplier to apply to the character's ragdoll.

Fields.Name: Ragdoll Restitution %
Fields.Description: The restitution coefficient multiplier to apply to the character's ragdoll.

Fields.Name: Ragdoll Maximum Speed %
Fields.Description: The maximum speed multiplier to apply to the character's ragdoll.

Fields.Name: Ragdoll Maximum Angular Velocity %
Fields.Description: The maximum angular velocity multiplier to apply to the character's ragdoll.

Fields.Name: Ragdoll Gravity Acceleration %: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum acceleration gravity can apply to the character's ragdoll.

Fields.Name: Ragdoll Gravity Acceleration %: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum acceleration gravity can apply to the character's ragdoll.

Fields.Name: Jump Collision: Horizontal Angle
Fields.Description: The horizontal angle (in degrees) for jump attack collision.

Fields.Name: Damage: Direction Rotation Speed
Fields.Description: The turning speed (in degrees per second) in the direction of damage that occurs.

Fields.Name: Damage: Knockback Reduction %
Fields.Description: The knockback reduction rate when damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Heavy Damage: Knockback Reduction %
Fields.Description: The knockback reduction rate when heavy damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Heavy Damage: Recovery Time
Fields.Description: The recovery time (in seconds) when heavy damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Heavy Damage: Vulnerability Time
Fields.Description: The vulnerability time (in seconds) when heavy damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Bleed Damage: Recovery Time
Fields.Description: The recovery time (in seconds) when bleed damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Heavy Damage: Input Reduction Time
Fields.Description: The input reduction time (in seconds) when heavy damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Guard Break: Vulnerability Time
Fields.Description: The vulnerability time (in seconds) when a guard break occurs.

Fields.Name: Guard Break: Input Reduction Time
Fields.Description: The input reduction time (in seconds) when a guard break occurs.

Fields.Name: Blowback: Deceleration Time - 1
Fields.Description: The deceleration time (in seconds) when blowback damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Blowback: Deceleration Time - 2
Fields.Description: The deceleration time (in seconds) when blowback damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Blowback: Deceleration - 1
Fields.Description: The deceleration (in metres per seconds squared) when blowback damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Blowback: Deceleration - 2
Fields.Description: The deceleration (in metres per seconds squared) when blowback damage occurs.

Fields.Name: Attack Pushback %
Fields.Description: The pushback reflection rate.

Fields.Name: Parry Rotation Speed
Fields.Description: The speed of turning during a parry (in degrees per second).

Fields.Name: Enable Breath Damage
Fields.Description: If enabled, breath damage can occur.

Fields.Name: Hit Judgment: Lower Body Height
Fields.Description: The lower body height for hit judgements.

Fields.Name: Hit Judgment: Front Angle
Fields.Description: The front (horizontal) angle used for hit judgements.

Fields.Name: Walk Attack: Movement Speed
Fields.Description: The movement speed of walk attacks (in metres per second).

Fields.Name: Walk Attack: Rotation Speed
Fields.Description: The turn speed of walk attacks (in degrees per second).

Fields.Name: Walk Attack: Range
Fields.Description: The range of walk attacks (in metres).

Fields.Name: Focus: Left Rotation Limit
Fields.Description: The left rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.

Fields.Name: Focus: Right Rotation Limit
Fields.Description: The right rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.

Fields.Name: Focus: Upper Rotation Limit
Fields.Description: The upper rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.

Fields.Name: Focus: Lower Rotation Limit
Fields.Description: The lower rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.

Fields.Name: Focus: Horizontal Limit
Fields.Description: The horizontal rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.

Fields.Name: Focus: Vertical Limit
Fields.Description: The vertical rotation limit (in degrees) when focusing a target.
